chapter_title: Highway Beautification on State Highway Right-of-way
text:
(a) A person may not place or maintain a sign on a state highway right-of-way unless authorized by state law.

(b) A person commits an offense if the person violates this section.

(c) An offense under this section is a Class C misdemeanor.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 392. Highway Beautification on State Highway Right-of-way
##### § 392.032 — Offense

(a) A person may not place or maintain a sign on a state highway right-of-way unless authorized by state law.

(b) A person commits an offense if the person violates this section.

(c) An offense under this section is a Class C misdemeanor.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: A person may not place or maintain a sign on a state highway right-of-way unless authorized by state law.

subsections.label: b

subsections.label: c
subsections.text: An offense under this section is a Class C misdemeanor.
